title: Gypsy
writer: Arthur Laurents, Gypsy Rose Lee, Leonard Spigelgass
actors: Rosalind Russell, Natalie Wood, Karl Malden
plot: Based on the Broadway hit about the life and times of burlesque dancer Gypsy Rose Lee and her aggressive stage mother, Mama Rose.
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 1 win & 12 nominations total
